title: phaeiris × nelsonii
intro: Phaeiris × nelsonii, also known as Nelson's Phaeiris or Nelson's Phlox, is a hybrid plant species within the Phlox genus, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and fragrant foliage. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Phaeiris × nelsonii include relief from colds, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Phaeiris × nelsonii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
